mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUESTION WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
AND LICENSE_CODE = #{licenseCode}
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM QUESTION WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
AND LICENSE_CODE = #{licenseCode}
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY Q_INDEX DESC
SELECT LICENSE_CODE as licenseCode, LICENSE_NAME as licenseName FROM LICENSE ORDER BY LICENSE_CODE ASC
